title: Making a complaint
setting: The fan you bought last week stopped working. You return to the shop with your receipt.

steps.speaker: Verchäuferin
steps.es: Grüezi. Was chan ich für Sie tue?
steps.en: Hello. What can I do for you?

options.es: Ich han das kauft und es gaht scho nöd meh.
options.en: I bought this and it no longer works.
options.feedback: Clear and factual — states the problem without aggression.
Starting hostile puts her on the defensive. Calm and factual works better.

options.es: Ich han es Problem mit dem.
options.en: I have a problem with this.
options.feedback: Okay, but vague. Saying what's wrong moves things faster.

steps.speaker: Verchäuferin
steps.es: Händ Sie d'Quittig, und wänn händ Sie's kauft?
steps.en: Do you have the receipt, and when did you buy it?

options.es: Ja, da. Ich han's vor ere Wuche kauft.
options.en: Yes, here. I bought it a week ago.
options.feedback: Receipt plus a clear timeframe — you're making her job easy.
Harder without it, but worth trying. Bring it next time.

options.en: A while ago, I don't remember.
options.feedback: Vague timing weakens your case — warranties have limits.

steps.speaker: Verchäuferin
steps.es: Ich luege. Was wänd Sie als Lösig?
steps.en: Let me check. What solution would you like?

options.es: Ich möcht es umtusche oder s'Gäld zrugg.
options.en: I'd like an exchange or my money back.
options.feedback: Stating your desired outcome clearly is how to resolve a complaint.
Polite, but naming what you want protects your interest.

options.en: I don't know, you tell me.
options.feedback: Hands her all the power. Know your ask.

steps.speaker: Verchäuferin
steps.es: Sie händ rächt, es isch i de Garantie. Sie überchömed en nöie.
steps.en: You're right, it's under warranty. You'll get a new one.

options.es: Das schätze ich sehr. Merci viilmal.
options.en: I appreciate that. Thank you very much.
options.feedback: Gracious in victory — leaving on good terms is smart.
She just helped you! Souring it burns goodwill.
Clean and polite. A satisfying close.
